title: Amazon leaked a buildable Halo Warthog from Mattel, not Lego.
summary: Mattel’s older Mega line of building sets included a couple of Halo sets featuring the Warthog , but Amazon Australia leaked a larger and more detailed 935-piece buildable UNSC M12 Warthog that’s part of Mattel’s recent Brick Shop line.
